description: Multi-column data table. macOS only (renders EmptyView on other platforms). Rows are set at runtime via setElementRows.

columnTypes.description: Per-column cell type config; array length should match columns; missing entries default to Text

actionID.description: Button only — fires on button click

widths.description: Ideal column widths in points; last column fills remaining space

minWidths.description: Minimum column widths in points; columns cannot be resized below these. Missing entries default to 10

doubleClickActionID.description: macOS only; fires on double-click; context = row index

stackedCards.description: ActionUIWeb-only: on a phone-width screen, render each row as a label:value card instead of a horizontal table (a lossy convenience). Suffix as 'stackedCards:web'.

value.description: Selected row as [String] (column values); access via getElementValue

states.selectedRowID.description: Stable row ID of selected row; nil when nothing selected
